title: [MTR 4] Airlink Shuttle 345
description:
Model from MTR mod
Reskin by holyHeccCapybara
body:
![Image showing the AL 345 model, taken from the front of the train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KyLFi2Hg/images/72e8fdd83266707f539ab0b559d4881746c0d2cb.png)

**⚠️ ONLY COMPATIBLE WITH MTR 4 ⚠️**

---

This resource pack adds the respective train from Stepford County Railway, to the list available in MTR. It is a reskin of the Elizabeth Line 345.

The pack includes;
  - Cab (Front + Rear)
  - White + Orange coaches (front and rear)
  - Gray middle coach.

(Standard formation would be Front, White //, Orange //, Gray, Orange\ \, White\ \ Back)
(Custom formations supported)

If there's any glaring issues feel free to let me know :)

_This pack is not affiliated with, nor a product of SCR_


_Many thanks to **Egamicoo** for providing additional images_
